name: ClassificationCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'Classification Commands' command group — 8 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

methods.name: GetAllClassificationSystems
methods.summary: Returns the list of available classification systems.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: classificationSystems.

methods.name: GetAllClassificationsInSystem
methods.summary: Returns the tree of classifications in the given classification system.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: classificationItems.

methods.name: GetClassificationItemAvailability
methods.summary: Returns the ids of property definitions available for a given classification item.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: classificationItemAvailabilityList.

methods.name: GetClassificationSystemIds
methods.summary: Returns the list of available classification systems.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: classificationSystemIds.

methods.name: GetClassificationSystems
methods.summary: Returns the details of classification systems identified by their GUIDs.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: classificationSystems.

methods.name: GetClassificationsOfElements
methods.summary: Returns the classification of the given elements in the given classification systems.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: elementClassifications.

methods.name: GetDetailsOfClassificationItems
methods.summary: Returns the details of classification items.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: classificationItems.

methods.name: SetClassificationsOfElements
methods.summary: Sets the classifications of elements. In order to set the classification of an element to unclassified, omit the classificationItemId field.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.
